headline: Pool Corporation (NASDAQ:POOL) Holds Steady After Inline Earnings, Resilient Maintenance Business Supports Quality Stock Outlook
summary: Pool Corporation's Q2 results met expectations with $1.82B sales and $5.38 EPS. Shares surged 4.5% pre-market after reaffirming 2026 guidance, signaling steady performance despite cautious outlook.
